title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXVI. Relics.
content:
Charley wag,
        Eat the pudding and left the bag.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXVI. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
